title: One-step addition & subtraction equations: fractions & decimals
description: Practice solving equations in one step by adding or subtracting a number from both sides. These problems involve decimals and fractions.
topic_path: One-step addition & subtraction equations: fractions & decimals

hints: Let's subtract to get $a$ by itself.

$\begin{align} \dfrac13 +a &= \dfrac54 \\
\\
 \dfrac13 +a \blue{-\dfrac13}&= \dfrac54\blue{-\dfrac13}~~~~\blue{\text{subtract }\dfrac13} \text{ from each side to get } a \text{ by itself }\\
\\
\cancel{ \dfrac13} +a {\blue{-}\cancel{\blue{\dfrac13}}}&= \dfrac54\blue{-\dfrac13}\\
\\
a &= \dfrac54\blue{-\dfrac13}\end{align}$

$\begin{align} \dfrac54-\dfrac13  &=\dfrac{5\times3}{4\times3}-\dfrac{1\times4}{3\times4}\\\\
&= \dfrac{15}{12}-\dfrac{4}{12} \\\\
&= \dfrac{11}{12} \end{align}$

The answer:

$a=\greenD{\dfrac{11}{12}} $

Let's check to make sure.

$\begin{align}
\dfrac13 +a &= \dfrac54 \\\\
\dfrac13 +\greenD{\dfrac{11}{12}} &\stackrel{?}{=} \dfrac54 \\\\
\dfrac{4}{12} +\greenD{\dfrac{11}{12}} &\stackrel{?}{=} \dfrac54 \\\\
\dfrac{15}{12} &\stackrel{?}{=} \dfrac54 \\\\
\dfrac54 &= \dfrac54 ~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's subtract to get $b$ by itself.

$\begin{align} \dfrac32 + b &= \dfrac74 \\
\\
 \dfrac32 +b \blue{-\dfrac32}&= \dfrac74\blue{-\dfrac32}~~~~~\blue{\text{subtract }\dfrac32} \text{ from each side to get } b \text{ by itself }\\
\\
\cancel{ \dfrac32} +b {\blue{-}\cancel{\blue{\dfrac32}}}&= \dfrac74\blue{-\dfrac32}\\
\\
b &= \dfrac74\blue{-\dfrac32}
\end{align}$

$\begin{align} \dfrac74-\dfrac32  &=\dfrac{7}{4}-\dfrac{3\times2}{2\times2}\\\\
&= \dfrac{7}{4}-\dfrac{6}{4} \\\\
&= \dfrac{1}{4} \end{align}$

The answer:

$b=\greenD{\dfrac14}$

Let's check to make sure.

$\begin{align}
 \dfrac32 + b &= \dfrac74\\\\
 \dfrac32 + \greenD{\dfrac14}&\stackrel{?}{=} \dfrac74 \\\\
 \dfrac64 + \greenD{\dfrac14}&\stackrel{?}{=} \dfrac74 \\\\
\dfrac74 &= \dfrac74 ~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's subtract to get $c$ by itself.

$\begin{align}\dfrac18 + c &= \dfrac45 \\
\\
 \dfrac18 +c\blue{-\dfrac18}&= \dfrac45\blue{-\dfrac18}~~~~~\blue{\text{subtract }\dfrac18} \text{ from each side to get } c \text{ by itself }\\
\\
\cancel{ \dfrac18} +c {\blue{-}\cancel{\blue{\dfrac18}}}&= \dfrac45\blue{-\dfrac18}\\
\\
c &= \dfrac45\blue{-\dfrac18}\end{align}$

$\begin{align} \dfrac45-\dfrac18  &=\dfrac{4\times8}{5\times8}-\dfrac{1\times5}{8\times5}\\\\
&= \dfrac{32}{40}-\dfrac{5}{40} \\\\
&= \dfrac{27}{40} \end{align}$

The answer:

$c=\greenD{\dfrac{27}{40}}$

Let's check to make sure.

$\begin{align}
\dfrac18 + c &= \dfrac45 \\\\
\dfrac18+\greenD{\dfrac{27}{40}}&\stackrel{?}{=} \dfrac45 \\\\
\dfrac5{40}+\greenD{\dfrac{27}{40}}&\stackrel{?}{=} \dfrac45 \\\\
\dfrac{32}{40}&\stackrel{?}{=} \dfrac45 \\\\
\dfrac45 &= \dfrac45 ~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's subtract to get $n$ by itself.

$\begin{align}\dfrac{11}6& =n+\dfrac79 \\
\\
 \dfrac{11}6 \blue{-\dfrac79}&= n+\dfrac79\blue{-\dfrac79}~~~~~\blue{\text{subtract }\dfrac79} \text{ from each side to get } n \text{ by itself }\\
\\
 \dfrac{11}6 \blue{-\dfrac79}&= n+\cancel{\dfrac79}\blue{-}\cancel{\blue{\dfrac79}}
\\\\
 \dfrac{11}6 \blue{-\dfrac79} &= n\end{align}$

$\begin{align} \dfrac{11}6-\dfrac79  &=\dfrac{11\times3}{6\times3}-\dfrac{7\times2}{9\times2}\\\\
&= \dfrac{33}{18}-\dfrac{14}{18} \\\\
&= \dfrac{19}{18} \end{align}$

The answer:

$n=\greenD{\dfrac{19}{18}}$

Let's check to make sure.

$\begin{align}
\dfrac{11}6 &=n+\dfrac79\\\\
\dfrac{11}6&\stackrel{?}{=} \greenD{\dfrac{19}{18}}+\dfrac79 \\\\
\dfrac{11}6&\stackrel{?}{=} \greenD{\dfrac{19}{18}}+\dfrac{14}{18} \\\\
\dfrac{11}6&\stackrel{?}{=} \dfrac{33}{18} \\\\
\dfrac{11}6 &= \dfrac{11}6 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's add to get $f$ by itself.

$\begin{align} f-\dfrac89 &=\dfrac59 \\
\\
 f-\dfrac89 \blue{+\dfrac89}&= \dfrac59\blue{+\dfrac89}~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{add }\dfrac89} \text{ to each side to get } f \text{ by itself }\\
\\
f-\cancel{ \dfrac89}   {\blue{+}\cancel{\blue{\dfrac89}}}&= \dfrac59\blue{+\dfrac89}\\
\\
f &= \dfrac59\blue{+\dfrac89}\end{align}$

The answer:

> $f=\green{\dfrac{13}9}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
f-\dfrac89 &=\dfrac59 \\\\
\green{\dfrac{13}9}-\dfrac89 &\stackrel{?}{=} \dfrac59 \\\\
\dfrac59 &= \dfrac59 ~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's add to get $g$ by itself.

$\begin{align} g-\dfrac37 &=\dfrac27 \\
\\
g- \dfrac37  \blue{+\dfrac37}&= \dfrac27\blue{+\dfrac37}~~~~~~~\blue{\text{add }\dfrac37} \text{ to each side to get } g \text{ by itself }\\
\\
g-\cancel{ \dfrac37}  {\blue{+}\cancel{\blue{\dfrac37}}}&= \dfrac27\blue{+\dfrac37}\\
\\
g &= \dfrac27\blue{+\dfrac37}\end{align}$

The answer:

> $g=\green{\dfrac57}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
g-\dfrac37 &=\dfrac27 \\\\
 \green{\dfrac57} -\dfrac37&\stackrel{?}{=} \dfrac27 \\\\
\dfrac27 &= \dfrac27 ~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's subtract to get $m$ by itself.

$\begin{align}\dfrac34 &=m+\dfrac14 \\
\\
 \dfrac34 \blue{-\dfrac14}&= m+\dfrac14\blue{-\dfrac14}~~~~~\blue{\text{subtract }\dfrac14} \text{ from each side to get } m \text{ by itself }\\
\\
 \dfrac34 \blue{-\dfrac14}&= m+\cancel{\dfrac14}\blue{-}\cancel{\blue{\dfrac14}}
\\\\
 \dfrac34 \blue{-\dfrac14} &= m\end{align}$

The answer:

> $m=\green{\dfrac12}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
\dfrac34 &=m+\dfrac14\\\\
\dfrac34&\stackrel{?}{=} \green{\dfrac12}+\dfrac14 \\\\
\dfrac34 &= \dfrac34 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's subtract to get $p$ by itself.

$\begin{align}\dfrac{5}7 &=p+\dfrac47 \\
\\
 \dfrac57 \blue{-\dfrac47}&= p+\dfrac47\blue{-\dfrac47}~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{subtract }\dfrac47} \text{ from each side to get } p \text{ by itself }\\
\\
 \dfrac57 \blue{-\dfrac47}&= p+\cancel{\dfrac47}\blue{-}\cancel{\blue{\dfrac47}}
\\
 \dfrac57 \blue{-\dfrac47} &= p\end{align}$

The answer:

> $p=\green{\dfrac17}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
\dfrac{5}7 &=p+\dfrac47\\\\
\dfrac57&\stackrel{?}{=} \green{\dfrac17}+\dfrac47 \\\\
\dfrac57 &= \dfrac57 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's add to get $t$ by itself.

$\begin{align}\dfrac5{13}&=t-\dfrac{6}{13}\\
\\
 \dfrac5{13} \blue{+\dfrac6{13}}&= t-\dfrac6{13}\blue{+\dfrac6{13}}~~~~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{add }\dfrac6{13}} \text{ to each side to get } t \text{ by itself }\\
\\
 \dfrac5{13} \blue{+\dfrac6{13}}&= t-\cancel{\dfrac6{13}}\blue{+}\cancel{\blue{\dfrac6{13}}}
\\\\
 \dfrac5{13} \blue{+\dfrac6{13}}&= t\end{align}$

The answer:

> $t=\green{\dfrac{11}{13}}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
\dfrac5{13}&=t-\dfrac{6}{13}\\\\
\dfrac5{13}&\stackrel{?}{=} \green{\dfrac{11}{13}}-\dfrac6{13} \\\\
\dfrac5{13} &= \dfrac5{13} ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's add to get $w$ by itself.

$\begin{align}\dfrac{11}{15}&=w-\dfrac{8}{15}\\
\\
 \dfrac{11}{15} \blue{+\dfrac8{15}}&= w-\dfrac8{15}\blue{+\dfrac8{15}}~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{add }\dfrac8{15}} \text{ to each side to get } w \text{ by itself }\\
\\
 \dfrac{11}{15} \blue{+\dfrac8{15}}&= w-\cancel{\dfrac8{15}}\blue{+}\cancel{\blue{\dfrac8{15}}}
\\\\
 \dfrac{11}{15} \blue{+\dfrac8{15}}&= w\end{align}$

The answer:

> $w=\green{\dfrac{19}{15}}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
\dfrac{11}{15}&=w-\dfrac{8}{15}\\\\
\dfrac{11}{15}&\stackrel{?}{=} \green{\dfrac{19}{15}}-\dfrac8{15} \\\\
\dfrac{11}{15} &= \dfrac{11}{15} ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's subtract to get $r$ by itself.

$\begin{align}1.25 &=0.75+r \\
\\
1.25 \blue{-0.75}&= 0.75+r\blue{-0.75}~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{subtract }0.75} \text{ to get } r \text{ by itself }\\
\\
 1.25 \blue{-0.75}&= \cancel{0.75}+r\blue{-}\cancel{\blue{0.75}}
\\\\
 1.25 \blue{-0.75} &= r\end{align}$

The answer:

> $r=\green{0.5}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
1.25 &=0.75+r\\\\
1.25&\stackrel{?}{=} 0.75+\green{0.5} \\\\
1.25 &= 1.25~~~~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's subtract to get $x$ by itself.

$\begin{align}6.2&=2.2+x \\
\\
 6.2 \blue{-2.2}&= 2.2+x\blue{-2.2}~~~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{subtract }2.2} \text{ to get } x \text{ by itself }\\
\\
 6.2 \blue{-2.2}&= \cancel{2.2}+x\blue{-}\cancel{\blue{2.2}}
\\\\
6.2 \blue{-2.2} &= x\end{align}$

The answer:

> $x=\green{4}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
6.2&=2.2+x\\\\
6.2&\stackrel{?}{=} 2.2+\green{4} \\\\
6.2&=6.2 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's add to get $x$ by itself.

$\begin{align}4.4&=x-5.6\\
\\
 4.4 \blue{+5.6}&= x-5.6\blue{+5.6}~~~~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{add }5.6} \text{ to each side to get } x \text{ by itself }\\
\\
 4.4 \blue{+5.6}&= x-\cancel{5.6}\blue{+}\cancel{\blue{5.6}}
\\\\
 4.4 \blue{+5.6}&= x\end{align}$

The answer:

> $x=\green{10}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
4.4&=x-5.6\\\\
4.4&\stackrel{?}{=} \green{10}-5.6 \\\\
4.4 &= 4.4 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's add to get $y$ by itself.

The answer:

> $y=\green{0.6}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
0.15&=y-0.45\\\\
0.15&\stackrel{?}{=} \green{0.6}-0.45 \\\\
0.15 &= 0.15~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's add to get $z$ by itself.

$\begin{align}2.2&=z-1.1\\
\\
2.2 \blue{+1.1}&= z-1.1\blue{+1.1}~~~~~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{add }1.1} \text{ to each side to get } z \text{ by itself }\\
\\
2.2 \blue{+1.1}&= z-\cancel{1.1}\blue{+}\cancel{\blue{1.1}}
\\\\
2.2 \blue{+1.1}&= z\end{align}$

The answer:

> $z=\green{3.3}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
2.2&=z-1.1\\\\
2.2&\stackrel{?}{=} \green{3.3}-1.1 \\\\
2.2 &= 2.2 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's add to get $k$ by itself.

$\begin{align} k-8 &=11.8 \\
\\
 k-8 \blue{+8}&= 11.8\blue{+8}~~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{add }8} \text{ to each side to get } k \text{ by itself }\\
\\
k-\cancel{ 8}  {\blue{+}\cancel{\blue{8}}}&= 11.8\blue{+8}\\
\\
k &= 11.8\blue{+8}\end{align}$

The answer:

> $k=\green{19.8}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
k-8 &=11.8 \\\\
\green{19.8} -8&\stackrel{?}{=} 11.8 \\\\
11.8 &= 11.8 ~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's subtract to get $d$ by itself.

$\begin{align} d+0.5 &=0.75 \\
\\
 d+0.5 \blue{-0.5}&= 0.75\blue{-0.5}~~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{subtract }0.5} \text{  to get } d \text{ by itself }\\
\\
d+\cancel{ 0.5} {\blue{-}\cancel{\blue{0.5}}}&= 0.75\blue{-0.5}\\
\\
d &= 0.75\blue{-0.5}\end{align}$

The answer:

> $d=\green{0.25}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
d+0.5 &=0.75 \\\\
 \green{0.25} +0.5&\stackrel{?}{=} 0.75 \\\\
0.75 &= 0.75 ~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's subtract to get $e$ by itself.

$\begin{align} e+1.2 &=2\\
\\
e+1.2 \blue{-1.2}&= 2\blue{-1.2}~~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{subtract }1.2} \text{ to get } e \text{ by itself }\\
\\
e+\cancel{ 1.2} {\blue{-}\cancel{\blue{1.2}}}&= 2\blue{-1.2}\\
\\
e &= 2\blue{-1.2}\end{align}$

The answer:

> $e=\green{0.8}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
e+1.2 &=2 \\\\
\green{0.8}+1.2 &\stackrel{?}{=} 2 \\\\
2 &= 2 ~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's add to get $h$ by itself.

$\begin{align} h-3.5 &=9 \\
\\
h- 3.5  \blue{+3.5}&=9\blue{+3.5}~~~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{add }3.5} \text{ to each side to get } h \text{ by itself }\\
\\
h-\cancel{ 3.5}   {\blue{+}\cancel{\blue{3.5}}}&= 9\blue{+3.5}\\
\\
h &= 9\blue{+3.5}\end{align}$

The answer:

> $h=\green{12.5}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
h-3.5 &=9\\\\
 \green{12.5}-3.5 &\stackrel{?}{=} 9 \\\\
9 &= 9 ~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
Let's add to get $j$ by itself.

$\begin{align}j-5 &=3.4 \\
\\
j- 5 \blue{+5}&= 3.4\blue{+5}~~~~~~~~~~~\blue{\text{add }5} \text{ to each side to get } j \text{ by itself }\\
\\
j-\cancel{ 5}  {\blue{+}\cancel{\blue{5}}}&= 3.4\blue{+5}\\
\\
j &=3.4\blue{+5}\end{align}$

The answer:

> $j=\green{8.4}$

Let's check to make sure.

>$\begin{align}
j-5 &=3.4\\\\
 \green{8.4}-5 &\stackrel{?}{=} 3.4 \\\\
3.4 &= 3.4 ~~~~~~~~~~\text{Yes!}
\end{align}$
